mapper.sql: select s.scene_id, s.scene_code, s.scene_name, s.business_domain, s.org_code, s.scene_type, s.default_object_dimension, s.active_version_id, pv.version_no as active_version_no, s.status, s.remark, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time from cost_scene s left join cost_publish_version pv on pv.version_id = s.active_version_id

where.if: and (s.scene_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or s.scene_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: order by s.update_time desc, s.scene_id desc
order by s.scene_name asc, s.scene_id asc

select count(1) as sceneCount, coalesce(sum(case when s.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as enabledSceneCount, count(distinct case when s.business_domain is not null and s.business_domain != '' then s.business_domain end) as businessDomainCount from cost_scene s

select s.scene_id as sceneId, s.scene_code as sceneCode, s.scene_name as sceneName, s.business_domain as businessDomain, s.default_object_dimension as defaultObjectDimension, s.status as status, s.active_version_id as activeVersionId, active_ver.version_no as activeVersionNo, (select count(1) from cost_fee_item f where f.scene_id = s.scene_id) as feeCount, (select count(1) from cost_variable_group g where g.scene_id = s.scene_id and exists (select 1 from cost_variable v where v.group_id = g.group_id)) as variableGroupCount, (select count(1) from cost_variable v where v.scene_id = s.scene_id) as variableCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.scene_id = s.scene_id) as ruleCount, (select count(1) from cost_publish_version p where p.scene_id = s.scene_id) as publishedVersionCount, (select count(1) from cost_calc_task t where t.scene_id = s.scene_id) as taskCount, (select count(1) from cost_calc_task t where t.scene_id = s.scene_id and t.task_status in ('INIT', 'RUNNING')) as runningTaskCount, (select count(1) from cost_calc_task t where t.scene_id = s.scene_id and (t.task_status = 'FAILED' or coalesce(t.fail_count, 0) > 0)) as failedTaskCount, (select count(1) from cost_result_ledger l where l.scene_id = s.scene_id) as resultLedgerCount from cost_scene s left join cost_publish_version active_ver on active_ver.version_id = s.active_version_id where s.scene_id = #{sceneId}

select t.task_id as taskId, t.task_no as taskNo, t.scene_id as sceneId, t.version_id as versionId, pv.version_no as versionNo, t.task_type as taskType, t.bill_month as billMonth, t.source_count as sourceCount, t.success_count as successCount, t.fail_count as failCount, t.task_status as taskStatus, t.progress_percent as progressPercent, t.started_time as startedTime, t.finished_time as finishedTime, t.duration_ms as durationMs, t.request_no as requestNo, t.execute_node as executeNode, t.input_source_type as inputSourceType, t.source_batch_no as sourceBatchNo, t.error_message as errorMessage from cost_calc_task t left join cost_publish_version pv on pv.version_id = t.version_id where t.scene_id = #{sceneId} order by coalesce(t.started_time, t.create_time) desc, t.task_id desc limit 5
